rows.description: 1787 Decr 4 To Sep for Redlington Rectory
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Description chosen from gemini-flash and verified visually; gpt-5-mini incorrectly read the date as 'Dec. 17' and the description as 'Fine for Kidlington Rectory'.

rows.description: Decr 17 To Sep for Jesus College d

rows.description: Mr Hadleys Fine Little Sew
rows.notes: Description chosen from gemini-flash, correcting 'Stew' to 'Sew' based on visual inspection; gpt-5-mini misread the name as 'Hastley'. Both extractors misidentified the pence fraction: gemini-flash missed it, gpt-5-mini read it as 0.75. Visual inspection clearly shows a '½' (0.5) mark after the '4'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Hadley in respect of a fine connected with Little Sew
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Hadley for a fine relating to Little Sew, amounting to £0 8s 4½d.

rows.description: Mr Napiers Fine Tintinhul
rows.notes: Description and amounts chosen from gemini-flash and verified visually. gpt-5-mini misread the name as 'Kapson' and the pence digit as '4'.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Napier for a fine relating to Tintinhul, amounting to £3 5s 7d.

rows.description: Mr Bennetts Fine Guynier

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Bennett for a fine relating to Guynier, amounting to £1 8s 0d.

rows.notes: Description from gemini-flash representing the horizontal line. Amounts agreed except for fraction. Visually verified the pence fraction as '½' (0.5), as stated by gemini-flash; gpt-5-mini incorrectly identified it as 0.75.

rows.description: Soluta Varia
rows.notes: Consensus across all extractors for description, type, and absence of amounts, verified visually.

rows.description: 1787 Novr 24 To Bromley. Brazier, his Bill

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of Bromley the brazier's bill, amounting to £0 9s 3d.

rows.description: Decr 3 To Brickland for Butt? Book W. Brickland
rows.notes: Amounts agreed by both extractors. Description is a merge based on visual verification: 'Butt?' ambiguity noted by gemini-flash is accurate, and the initial 'W.' for Brickland (from gpt-5-mini) is correct, not 'M.' (from gemini-flash).
rows.english_description: Payment to W. Brickland for a book (butt/book unclear in transcription)

rows.description: 17 Allowed Grofs Expences. J. Marchant

rows.description: To Cavier. Smith, his Bill in full
